prose:
Method-provenance block
Property: HOMO energy of benzene (eV) together with orbital file generation
Level of theory: GFN2-xTB (semi-empirical tight-binding)
Geometry provenance: user-supplied benzene.xyz (no re-optimization; visualization single-point only)
Solvent / environment: gas phase (no implicit solvation)
Charge / multiplicity: 0, 1 (closed-shell)
Software: xtb via chemkit visualize-orbitals skill
Convergence: SCF converged; no warnings reported by engine.

The visualize-orbitals skill wrote a Molden orbital file containing 30 MOs; the highest-occupied molecular orbital (HOMO, index 15) energy is −10.909314 eV and the lowest-unoccupied (LUMO, index 16) energy is −6.0841954 eV, giving a frontier gap of ≈ 4.825 eV at this semi-empirical level.

Live log & files: calculation ran in the xtb working directory /tmp/chemkit_orb_xtb_hsubp7g2 with live output streamed to the molden path reported above.
